mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon_t WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY coupon_idx
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_coupon_t (c_idx, coupon_idx, expire_date) VALUES (#{c_idx}, #{couponIdx}, DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{expireDays} DAY))
mapper.select: SELECT cc.cc_idx, cc.c_idx, cc.coupon_idx, ct.name AS coupon_name, ct.type AS coupon_type, ct.value AS coupon_value, ct.description, cc.issued_date, cc.expire_date, cc.used FROM customer_coupon_t cc JOIN coupon_t ct ON cc.coupon_idx = ct.coupon_idx WHERE cc.c_idx = #{c_idx} ORDER BY cc.used ASC, cc.expire_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_coupon_t SET used = 1, used_date = NOW() WHERE cc_idx = #{cc_idx} AND used = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM customer_coupon_t WHERE cc_idx = #{cc_idx} AND used = 0
mapper.select: SELECT cc.cc_idx, c.name AS customer_name, c.grade, ct.name AS coupon_name, ct.type AS coupon_type, cc.issued_date, cc.expire_date, cc.used FROM customer_coupon_t cc JOIN customer_t c ON cc.c_idx = c.c_idx JOIN coupon_t ct ON cc.coupon_idx = ct.coupon_idx WHERE c.active = 0 ORDER BY cc.issued_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
